{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012807A4E68A9A13EEB86BAEBC"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7423825940533543704","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"笔力很好，要是单纯修仙小说我回追，但是主角的长像，和能力是克苏鲁风啊[捂脸]世界观也是修仙。你写出了田园休闲的感觉，主角挺幽默的让我想起了大大怪","text_exts":[{"e":32,"s":29,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774200487B86BAEBC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227423825940533543704%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227415938203984595993%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728506580,"group_id":"7415938203984595993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"作者很懒，懒得介绍。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ZPti0zkOIYwF4oTksY+K8Xq+35nCgES+xSoC3m/FKi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b2ddca385d5c4a56be34878c3551b53f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789094&x-signature=goykvaVBdmUEq7JpKyDquaVKOWg%3D","user_id":"2264635374307742","user_name":"墨逐酒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2264635374307742","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7415938203984595993","book_info":{"abstract":"你可曾见过赤血炎阳，深海瞳孔？
陈异并不相信世界上有诡异的存在，直到看到了那只「眼睛」
我以为我死了，
但我却成了他们中的一员。
......
多年之后，
陈异四周强敌环伺，
入必杀之局，
而他却不紧不慢
长吟道:
时世艰维曲中难，
诡道难为世人容。
有相虚妄执可破，
尽斩三尸魂难灭。
四方易位八轮回，
游经天地开六合。
成仙非是应得道，
吾以诡身铸长生！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3452296b835fef2af6e9a13216e75061~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"祈笔有神","author_id":"","book_id":"7415938203984595993","book_name":"修仙：从转生克苏鲁开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#481818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7415992663352033816","read_count":"20","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"131567"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"60","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,架空,东方玄幻,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3452296b835fef2af6e9a13216e75061~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384487&x-signature=N4xD7f08pcG%2FQ9O95ys3fig7ub8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"235763363219945","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012807A4E68A9A13EEB86BAEBC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"
